creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
It failed on 9.3 here:

checking whether /usr/local/bin/clang++36 supports C++14 features by default... no
checking whether /usr/local/bin/clang++36 supports C++14 features with -std=gnu++14... no
checking whether /usr/local/bin/clang++36 supports C++14 features with -std=gnu++1y... no
checking whether /usr/local/bin/clang++36 supports C++14 features with -std=c++14... no
checking whether /usr/local/bin/clang++36 supports C++14 features with -std=c++1y... no
configure: error: *** A compiler with support for C++14 language features is required.
